file_insights.purpose: Comprehensive contribution guidelines for the Inventory APK project

patterns_discovered.context: Project uses layered architecture (Presentation, Domain, Data)
patterns_discovered.implementation: ViewModels for UI state, Use Cases for business logic, Repository pattern for data access

patterns_discovered.context: Data flows explicitly: Repository → UseCase → ViewModel → UI
patterns_discovered.implementation: StateFlow for state management, Flow for reactive updates

patterns_discovered.context: 70% unit tests, 20% integration tests, 10% E2E tests
patterns_discovered.implementation: Minimum 70% overall coverage, 90%+ for critical code

patterns_discovered.context: Separation between screen-level (with ViewModel) and content composables
patterns_discovered.implementation: Testable, stateless content composables with previews

patterns_discovered.context: Automated checks using ktlint, detekt, gradle tasks
patterns_discovered.implementation: Mandatory pre-merge checks running in CI/CD

gotchas_discovered.description: 1036-line document requires careful organization and navigation
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Comprehensive table of contents with anchor links

gotchas_discovered.description: 90%+ coverage for business logic is demanding, may slow contributions
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Clear test examples provided for different scenarios

gotchas_discovered.description: ktlint, detekt, gradle, Android Studio setup creates onboarding complexity
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Step-by-step setup guide with verification commands

gotchas_discovered.description: MVVM + Clean Architecture may be unfamiliar to some contributors
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Architecture documentation reference with layer explanations

gotchas_discovered.description: Strict 120-char line length and formatting rules via ktlint

approach_outcome.description: Successfully created comprehensive contribution guidelines for Inventory APK
approach_outcome.deliverable: Complete CONTRIBUTING.md with detailed sections covering all aspects of project contribution
quality_indicators: Clear code examples for Kotlin conventions

recommendations.recommendation: Periodically review and update contribution guidelines as project evolves
Create PR template and issue template files to guide contributors in standard formats
Add a QUICK_START.md for fast-track setup (5-10 minutes) before full development setup
Add CI/CD configuration example showing how to validate contributions locally before push
Create contributor badge/recognition system to encourage ongoing participation
Link to specific ADRs (Architecture Decision Records) for complex design choices
